svg.title: Payment POC - Kafka system design
svg.desc: FastAPI producer publishes payment events to Kafka topic. Five independent consumer groups each read the same event for fraud, wallet, notifications, audit, and analytics. Failed events go to dead letter queue.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I fire fake payment events in the POC — curl or a script?')
sendPrompt('Explain the FastAPI producer and why we use the Outbox pattern')
sendPrompt('How does the payments.initiated topic work? Explain partitions and why we partition by user_id')
sendPrompt('What is the dead letter queue topic and when does a message end up there?')
sendPrompt('What exactly does the fraud scorer consumer do and how does Redis help?')
sendPrompt('How does the wallet updater handle idempotency so double-processing never double-charges?')
sendPrompt('What does the notifier consumer do in this POC?')
sendPrompt('How does the audit logger create an immutable record and why does Kafka make this easy?')
sendPrompt('What metrics does the analytics consumer track?')
sendPrompt('What does the DLQ handler consumer do with failed events?')

svg.text: all services run in Docker Compose · no cloud · no real money · fake events
